query: How many Buddhist texts do you have?
Do you have any Jain texts?
Show me documents about the Pali Canon
What Hindu scriptures do you carry?
How many documents are in the library total?
response: The library holds a total of [44,943 documents](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Baha'i%20Books/adib-taherzadeh_the-revelation-of-bahaullah-vol-2#p1251), spanning a wide range of traditions and collections. This includes 5,659 Bahá'í documents, 1,418 Jewish texts, and 858 Buddhist writings, among others. The diversity of the library is reflected in its collections, such as the [Pali Canon](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Baha'i%20Books/adib-taherzadeh_the-revelation-of-bahaullah-vol-1#p381), which comprises the oldest surviving Buddhist scriptures.
